arts.ttl: Barnet A Point Away After An Exciting Easter Monday
arts.sum: Altrincham’s wait for a win is over - a fine 3-0 at play-off rivals FC Halifax Town was inspired by two-goal Regan Linney. They ended their three-game run without a win and settled their nerves with after defeating Sutton United 3-1.

arts.ttl: Barnet on the brink of Football League return after win at Sutton
arts.sum: Poor recent form had held up their promotion charge.
